# Step 03: Migration Specification — Java 8→21, Spring Boot 2→3, AWS→Azure
# Generated by GH Copilot CLI - Spec2Cloud Methodology

## MIGRATION SPECIFICATION DOCUMENT

### Scope
Modernize Assets Manager from Java 8/Spring Boot 2.7/AWS to Java 21/Spring Boot 3.4/Azure.

---

## A. JAVA VERSION: 8 → 21

### A1. pom.xml Changes
- Parent POM: `<java.version>8</java.version>` → `<java.version>21</java.version>`
- Maven compiler source/target: 21
- Spring Boot parent: 2.7.18 → 3.4.1

### A2. Language Feature Migrations

#### A2.1 Records (replaces Lombok @Data DTOs)
| File | Current | Target |
|------|---------|--------|
| web/model/S3StorageItem.java | @Data @NoArgsConstructor @AllArgsConstructor class | record S3StorageItem(String key, String name, ...) |
| web/model/ImageProcessingMessage.java | @Data @NoArgsConstructor @AllArgsConstructor class | record ImageProcessingMessage(String key, ...) |
| worker/model/ImageProcessingMessage.java | @Data @NoArgsConstructor @AllArgsConstructor class | record ImageProcessingMessage(String key, ...) |

#### A2.2 Local Variable Type Inference (var)
Apply `var` for local variables where type is obvious from RHS:
- Builder patterns: `var request = ListObjectsV2Request.builder()...`
- Collection assignments: `var objects = storageService.listObjects()`
- Stream results: `var items = response.contents().stream()...`

#### A2.3 Text Blocks
- Multi-line log messages
- String concatenation in logging statements

#### A2.4 Switch Expressions
| File | Method | Current | Target |
|------|--------|---------|--------|
| WebMvcConfig.java | detectOperationType() | if-else chain | switch expression with arrow syntax |
| AbstractFileProcessingService.java | image format handling | if-else | switch expression |

#### A2.5 Pattern Matching for instanceof
- Replace `if (x instanceof Foo) { Foo f = (Foo) x; }` with `if (x instanceof Foo f)`
- Apply in exception handling and type checking blocks

#### A2.6 Sealed Interfaces
| Interface | Permitted Implementations |
|-----------|------------------------|
| StorageService | AwsS3Service (→AzureBlobService), LocalFileStorageService |
| FileProcessor | S3FileProcessingService (→AzureBlobProcessingService), LocalFileProcessingService |

#### A2.7 Virtual Threads (Java 21)
- Configure Spring Boot to use virtual threads for request handling
- Add `spring.threads.virtual.enabled=true` to application.properties

---

## B. SPRING BOOT: 2.7.18 → 3.4.x

### B1. Parent POM
```xml
<version>3.4.1</version>
```

### B2. Namespace Migration (javax → jakarta)
| Old Import | New Import | Files |
|-----------|-----------|-------|
| javax.persistence.* | jakarta.persistence.* | ImageMetadata.java (web + worker) |
| javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest | jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest | WebMvcConfig.java |
| javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse | jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse | WebMvcConfig.java |

### B3. Deprecated Class Replacements
| Deprecated | Replacement | File |
|-----------|-------------|------|
| WebMvcConfigurerAdapter | WebMvcConfigurer | WebMvcConfig.java |
| HandlerInterceptorAdapter | HandlerInterceptor | WebMvcConfig.java |

### B4. Configuration Changes
- Remove explicit Hibernate dialect (auto-detected in Spring Boot 3)
- Update JPA properties if needed
- Verify PostgreSQL driver compatibility

---

## C. AWS → AZURE CLOUD MIGRATION

### C1. Storage: S3 → Azure Blob Storage
| Aspect | AWS (Current) | Azure (Target) |
|--------|--------------|----------------|
| SDK | software.amazon.awssdk:s3 | com.azure:azure-storage-blob |
| Config Class | AwsS3Config.java | AzureBlobConfig.java |
| Service Class | AwsS3Service.java | AzureBlobService.java |
| Worker Service | S3FileProcessingService.java | AzureBlobProcessingService.java |
| Container concept | Bucket | Container |
| Object concept | S3Object | BlobItem |
| Client | S3Client | BlobServiceClient |
| Properties | aws.accessKey, aws.secretKey, aws.region, aws.s3.bucket | azure.storage.connection-string, azure.storage.container-name |

### C2. Messaging: RabbitMQ → Azure Service Bus
| Aspect | RabbitMQ (Current) | Azure Service Bus (Target) |
|--------|-------------------|---------------------------|
| Starter | spring-boot-starter-amqp | azure-messaging-servicebus (Spring Cloud Azure) |
| Config | RabbitConfig.java | ServiceBusConfig.java |
| Annotation | @RabbitListener | JMS or Service Bus SDK listener |
| Properties | spring.rabbitmq.* | spring.cloud.azure.servicebus.* |
| Acknowledgment | Channel.basicAck() | ServiceBusReceivedMessageContext.complete() |

### C3. Controller/View Renaming
| Current | Target |
|---------|--------|
| S3Controller.java | StorageController.java (optional rename) |
| S3StorageItem.java | StorageItem.java or BlobStorageItem.java |
| References to "S3" in templates | Update to "Azure Blob" or generic "Storage" |

---

## D. TEST UPDATES

### D1. S3FileProcessingServiceTest.java
- Rename to AzureBlobProcessingServiceTest.java
- Replace S3Client mocks with BlobServiceClient/BlobContainerClient mocks
- Update assertions for Azure SDK methods
- Maintain same test coverage

---

## E. EXECUTION ORDER
1. Step 04: Update Java version in POMs
2. Step 05: Migrate Spring Boot 2 → 3 (jakarta, dependency updates)
3. Step 06: Modernize Java code (records, var, patterns, sealed, virtual threads)
4. Step 07: Migrate AWS → Azure (SDK swap, config, services)
5. Step 08: Build and test
